name: TRIZEL SOLAR_LUNAR_RATIO_CONTINUED_FRACTION
definition: Continued-fraction structure for the canonical Solar–Lunar year ratio R = Y_SOLAR_TT_DAYS / Y_LUNAR_12_SYNODIC_DAYS
determinism_rule: If TRZ-PHY-ASTR-001 inputs change, this artifact must receive a version bump and a new Layer-1 validation artifact.
